name: Sunshine Salad
recipeInstructions:
1 Dissolve the gelatin in boiling water.
2 Drain the pineapple and set aside; add enough water to the reserved juice to equal 1 cup, then stir into the gelatin mixture. Add the orange juice concentrate.
3 Chill until partially set.
4 Fold in the drained pineapple and mandolin oranges.
5 Pour into a 4-cup mold or glass bowl and chill until set.
